zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda Ridel於大約1105年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特時，她的父親Galfrid de Ridel Count of Blaye32歲，母親Geva d'Avranches29歲。她於大約1122年與Richard Basset Chief Justice of England在英國英格蘭德比夏爾紐波勒德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1144年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾可利其德雷頓享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda Ridel于大约1105年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特时，她的父亲Galfrid de Ridel Count of Blaye32岁，母亲Geva d'Avranches29岁。她于大约1122年与Richard Basset Chief Justice of England在英国英格兰德比夏爾紐波勒德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1144年在英国英格兰斯塔福爾可利其德雷頓享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ridel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Middlesex): from the Middle English female personal name Rimilde, Rimilda, from Old English or Old Norse Rimhild, perhaps derived from hrīm ‘frost’ + hild ‘battle’, or more likely from the corresponding Old Norse words; a (H)rimhild was the wife of Knut Sveinson of Jadar, according to Snorri Sturluson in Heimskringla. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Rimmel
meanings: English (Middlesex): variant of   Rimel  . This surname is now rare in Britain.
German: variant of Rimmele, from Rümelin, a pet form of the ancient Germanic personal name Ruombald, a compound of hruom ‘glory’ + balt ‘bold, brave’.

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda Ridel was born about 1105, in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Galfrid de Ridel Count of Blaye, was 32 and her mother, Geva d'Avranches, was 29. She married Richard Basset Chief Justice of England about 1122, in Newbold, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1144, in Drayton, Penkridge, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda Ridel est née environ 1105, à Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Galfrid de Ridel Count of Blaye, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Geva d'Avranches, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Basset Chief Justice of England environ 1122, à Newbold, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1144, à Drayton, Penkridge, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans.

Lei sposato Richard Basset Chief Justice of England circa 1122, nel Newbold, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1144, nel Drayton, Penkridge, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda Ridelが約1105年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアドレイトン バセットで生まれた時，父Galfrid de Ridel Count of Blayeは32歳，母Geva d'Avranchesは29歳であった。約1122年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアニューボルドでRichard Basset Chief Justice of Englandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1144年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアペンクリッジドレイトンで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda Ridel(이)가 대략 1105년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 드라이턴 배싯에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Galfrid de Ridel Count of Blaye(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Geva d'Avranches(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 대략 1122년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 뉴볼드에서 Richard Basset Chief Justice of England(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1144년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 펜크리지 드라이턴에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda Ridel родилась около 1105 г. в местности дреитон бассетт, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Galfrid de Ridel Count of Blaye было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Geva d'Avranches, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Basset Chief Justice of England около 1122 г. в местности нюболд, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1144 г. в местности дреитон, пенкридж, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет.

es.Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England: Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Matilda Ridel nació aproximadamente 1105, en Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Galfrid de Ridel Count of Blaye, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Geva d'Avranches, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Richard Basset Chief Justice of England aproximadamente 1122, en Newbold, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1144, en Drayton, Penkridge, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años.
